name: @mobile-reality/mdma-mcp
description: MCP server for MDMA — exposes spec, prompts, docs, and package metadata to AI assistants.
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to MDMA (Markdown Document with Mounted Applications) — an open-source library for building interactive Markdown documents with forms, approval gates, tables, and other mounted components. Use this server when developing chat apps, agents, or tools that generate MDMA documents: it exposes the format spec, authoring prompts, package metadata, and always-fresh docs fetched straight from the GitHub repository. Tools included: get-spec, get-prompt, build-system-prompt, validate-prompt, list-packages, list-docs, get-doc. Built and maintained by Mobile Reality — https://github.com/MobileReality/mdma

tools.name: get-spec
tools.description: Returns the full MDMA specification: component types, JSON schemas, binding syntax, and authoring rules.

tools.name: get-prompt
tools.description: Returns a named MDMA prompt (mdma-author, mdma-reviewer, or mdma-fixer).

tools.name: build-system-prompt
tools.description: Generates a custom MDMA prompt from structured input (domain, components, fields, steps, business rules).

tools.name: validate-prompt
tools.description: Validates a custom prompt against MDMA conventions — returns warnings and suggestions.

tools.name: list-packages
tools.description: Returns all MDMA npm packages with purpose, install command, usage example, and category.

tools.name: list-docs
tools.description: Returns the catalog of MDMA documentation files available for fetching from the public GitHub repo.

tools.name: get-doc
tools.description: Fetches the latest version of an MDMA doc from raw.githubusercontent.com/MobileReality/mdma. Supports an optional ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA).
